eCOM BOTTLENECK CHECKLIST 

ecom.cathowell.com







ACTIVITY

INDUSTRY AVERAGE

TOF/MOF CTR 

1-2% 

BOF CTR 

2-3% 

CPC 

$1

Lead magnet opt in 

20% 

Website bounce rate (from FB ads) 

20% 

Website add to cart rate 

16-20% 

Website add to cart bounce rate 

68% 

Website conversion rate 

2-3% 











ISSUE

SOLUTIONS

Can’t get good CTR TOF 

Test different ad format 

Check creative and CTAs in creative 

Test different audience 

CPC is way too expensive TOF 

Check CTR - if this is under 1% then review creative/audience 

Check negative feedback 

Check relevance - if under 7 add continuity in funnel  

Duplicate and test higher bids (until 1,000 impressions) 

If all above fails test new audiences (try a much larger/broader one or a highly segmented one) 

Can’t get a good CTR TOF 

Check creative - test new creative and ad formats 

Check placements (if all desktop, try mobile) 

Try different audience 

If above fails - you may need to add step to funnel to warm up audience a bit more 

Please note - some industries, such as insurance are notorious for really bad CTRs, just be aware of this 

Can’t get good CTR on MOF/BOF

Check creative - test new creative and ad formats

Check quality of audience being built TOF - this could be an indications that the TOF audience is not high quality (possibly due to “clickbait” creative 

Driving lots of clicks, but nothing is converting 

Check your bounce rate (link clicks vs landing page hits) 

Check your traffic placements (Audience Network and Instant Articles, for example, are notorious for not being that great TOF) 

Check website UX 

My MOF and BOF ad sets just stall 

Check Audience tab to make sure custom audiences have populated properly 

Check that there are no other ad accounts running traffic to same exact audiences from same exact page 

Check that there are no other ad sets in account running traffic to same exact audiences from same exact page 

Check negative feedback on ads 

Switch to impressions to kick start - if this fails duplicate with higher bids 

If all above fails, switch to post engagement objective campaign
